text: [Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the cup tie against Manchester United on 12/1. Has been sidelined since. Returned to training on 6/11 but some way from a playing comeback. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Taken off at half-time of the match against Burnley on 1/11 after experiencing some muscular discomfort. Missed the Slavia Prague game on 4/11. Reports suggest he could be out until after the November international break and his manager hinted that he would miss the Sunderland match on 8/11. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the opening match of 2025/26 and underwent surgery at the end of August. Faces a long spell on the sidelines. His manager has hinted at a return after the November international break. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Man City on 21/9. Media reports suggest he could be out for 6-8 weeks. His manager has hinted at a return after the November international break. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Ruled out of the EFL Cup match with Brighton on 29/10 through injury. Has been sidelined since. Reports suggest he could be out until after the November international break and his manager hinted that he would miss the Sunderland match on 8/11. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Was taken off after a clash of knees in the match against West Ham on 4/10. Was later pictured in a knee brace and the player is “not positive about it”. Reports over the October international break suggest he could be out for six weeks. His manager has hinted at a return after the November international break. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Remains sidelined with an unspecified issue as of 31/10. Is “weeks” away from a return. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the match against Liverpool on 1/11 and his manager expects him to be sidelined for “weeks”. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Revealed to be recovering from a muscle injury as of 7/11. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Back injury Missed the Newcastle game on 9/11 with a back injury. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His club reported on 15/10 that he had suffered an ACL injury and had undergone season-ending surgery. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Knee injury Withdrew from the Germany under-21 squad over the October international break. Has been sidelined since and only has a “small chance” of facing Leeds on 1/11. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Substituted in the first half of the match against Bournemouth on 13/9 after injuring his ankle ligaments. Set for a long spell out. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Newcastle game on 4/5 with a knee  injury. Ruled out for the season on 9/5. Hasn’t featured at all in pre-season. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Ruled out of the EFL Cup match with Arsenal on 29/10 due to a minor muscle injury. Unlikely to return against Leeds on 1/11. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Knock As of 2/10 he is being assessed day by day because of a knock.  Has been sidelined since and only has a “small chance” of facing Leeds on 1/11. Is at least training again and could return before the November international break. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His manager confirmed on 26/7 that he will undergo surgery on a knee ligament injury. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Reports in July suggest he has undergone surgery on an ACL injury. Faces a long spell on the sidelines. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Returned from a long-term knee injury in pre-season but had a small setback with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager reported another setback on 16/10. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Missed the start of the season. Had been training and aiming for a return to action after the October international break but he has had a setback and will be out for “a few months”. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Initially ruled out until December on 17/10 because of a muscle injury. Could now be back after the November international break. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Underwent thigh surgery on 9/9 and will be sidelined for a while. His manager said on 4/11 that he may return in December or January. [Source]

[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament It was revealed on 7/8 that he has suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury and has since had an operation. He is expected to miss most of the 2025/26 season. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knee injury Requested to be taken off with a knee complaint in the match against Wolverhampton Wanderers on 8/11. Has since withdrawn from the Argentina squad. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Substituted early in the game against Qarabag on 5/11 with a quad injury. Will miss the Wolverhampton Wanderers match on 8/11 as assessment continues. [Source]
[Suspended] Provisionally suspended by the Football Association after failing a drugs test. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Requested to be taken off with a groin complaint in the match against Wolverhampton Wanderers on 8/11. [Source]

[Injured] Groin Injury Taken off with a recurrence of his niggly groin injury in the match against Manchester United on 20/9. His manager said he had gone into the game not feeling “100%”. Initially ruled out until after the October international break but his manager confirmed a further six-week absence on 17/10. Could return after the November internationals. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Will miss the AZ Alkmaar game on 6/11 with a minor abductor injury. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Ruled out of the Brentford game on 26/1 with a knee injury. It was subsequently revealed that he would miss the rest of the season and the start of 2025/26. Still out as of 12/9. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the Brighton game on 9/11 with a heavy bone bruise. [Source]
[Injured] Back injury Has missed most of pre-season with back problems and his manager said on 8/8 that he does not know when he will return. Still unavailable as of 26/9. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the cup match against Liverpool on 29/10. A scan has revealed only minor damage and he will return after the November international break. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Reports on 13/8 suggest he has picked up a hamstring injury and may be out until the end of September. His manager hasn’t confirmed that timeline but said he was a “few weeks” away as of 12/9. Is “making progress” but remains out as of 26/9. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury Suffered an injury while playing for Everton under-21s and looks set to miss the Manchester City game on 18/10. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 8/11.
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Felt discomfort in his hamstring and had to come off in the match against Everton on 8/11. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Aggravated his old knee injury while on duty with the USA over the October international break. Has been sidelined since and remains out as of 1/11. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knee injury A “question mark” for the Nottingham Forest game on 9/11 with a MCL injury. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the whole of pre-season with a hamstring injury but returned to light training during the September international break. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Eintracht Frankfurt on 22/10. His manager thinks he will be out for “weeks”. Confirmed as out until after the November international break but there is no precise return date yet. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the match against Southampton on 23/9. Has torn his ACL and will be out for a year. [Source]

[Injured] Muscle injury Picked up a hamstring injury in the match against Galatasaray on 30/9. Reports suggest he could be out for 6-8 weeks and he has been sidelined since. Confirmed as out until after the November international break on 3/11. Should be fit to face Nottingham Forest on 22/11. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Missed the Borussia Dortmund game on 5/11 because he “didn’t feel perfect”. Unlikely to be risked against Liverpool on 9/11. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 2/11 with an ankle injury. His manager said "he will be out for a while". [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Had to come off in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 8/11. No details have been provided on his injury. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hamstring injury Taken off with what looked like a hamstring injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 8/11. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knock Missed the Tottenham Hotspur match on 8/11 with a knock. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a serious knee injury in the match against Crystal Palace on 2/2. Ruled out for a significant period of time. Still unavailable as of 30/10 but is now in training. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 8/11. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Leg injury Taken off with an injury in the match against Brentford on 9/11. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury His manager revealed on 17/10 that he was sidelined with a thigh injury. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after he was sent off for a second yellow card against Brentford on 9/11. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Hip injury Substituted at half-time of the match against Athletic Club on 5/11 because of a niggling hip injury. Is awaiting the results of a scan and there is “every chance” he will miss the Brentford game on 9/11. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Arsenal on 28/9. Ruled out for up to eight weeks. On the grass for the first time as of 24/10. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Withdrew from the squad to face Athletic Club on 5/11 because of a niggling ankle injury. Faces “weeks” out as he recovers from it. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Returned from the September internationals with a knee injury and has been sidelined since. His manager said on 17/9 that he was expected back after the October international break. His recovery has since been pushed back to November. On the grass as of 7/11 but not ready for a playing comeback. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in Nigeria’s match against South Africa on 9/9. Looks set for at least three months out. [Source]
[Injured] Knock Has been sidelined since the October international break with an unspecified and remains out as of 30/10. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Revealed to be sidelined on 30/10 with a knee ligament issue. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Dead leg Suffered a knock in the match against Manchester United on 1/11. Missed the game against Sturm Graz on 6/11 and it’s “improbable” that he will recover in time to face Leeds on 9/11. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Substituted early in the match against Manchester United on 1/11 with what looked like a hamstring injury. His manager said on 5/11 that his recovery is “not likely to be a quick situation”. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Knee injury Missed the Porto game on 23/10 and has been sidelined since. He is “making good progress” as of 5/11 but it is “improbable” that he will recover in time to face Leeds on 9/11. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Came off at half-time of the Porto game on 23/10 and has been sidelined since. His manager said on 30/10 that recovery was taking “longer than we thought”. [Source]

[Injured] Head injury Missed the Chelsea game on 25/10 with concussion. Had hoped to be back for the Everton match on 3/11 but had a “residual symptom” and missed out. Will also sit out the Arsenal game on 8/11. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Shoulder injury Missed the start of the season with a shoulder injury. A month away as of 2/10. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Wrist Injury Missed the start of the season with a wrist injury. His manager said on 11/9 that he had suffered a setback and needed a further period of rest. A month away as of 2/10. [Source]
[Injured] Groin Injury Missed the Aston Villa game on 21/9 with a groin injury. Has since undergone surgery and will be sidelined until December. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Achilles injury Missed the first three matches of the season with an Achilles injury. His manager said on 11/9 that there had been a setback and that he needed a further period of rest. A month away as of 2/10. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Underwent hamstring surgery on 19/7 and will miss the start of the season. Six weeks away from a return as of 2/10. [Source]
[Injured] Head injury Suffered a concussion in the match against Chelsea on 1/11. Will miss the next two games. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Stretchered off while playing for Mali on 12/10. Will be out for “weeks”. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Seemed to be struggling with a muscular injury while playing for Wales on 13/10. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Elfsborg on 30/1. An ACL tear was subsequently diagnosed and he missed the rest of 2024/25. Still unavailable as of 15/8. [Source]
[Injured] Calf injury It was revealed in late October that he was sidelined with a calf injury. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Knock Missed the Champions League game against Copenhagen on 4/11 with a knock despite his manager being optimistic that he would be fit. Is “touch and go” for the Manchester United game on 8/11. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knock in the match against Crystal Palace on 11/5. It later transpired that he had sustained a knee injury and would need season-ending surgery. Still out as of 15/8. [Source]
[Injured] Anterior cruciate ligament Suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury in pre-season and will miss a significant period of 2025/26. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Missed the Bournemouth game on 30/8 with an ankle injury. Has been sidelined since and underwent minor surgery. Won’t return before the November international break. [Source]
[Injured] Thigh injury Ruled out for “weeks” on 29/7 with plantar fasciitis then suffered a quad injury. Has not played since. Close to a return to training as of 31/10. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Ruled out for four to six weeks on 2/10. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Back injury It was reported on 6/11 that he was currently sidelined with a back injury. [Source]

[Injured] Muscle injury Has been sidelined with a thigh injury since the October international break. His manager said on 31/10 that he was on the grass and that his recovery should go “fast”. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Ruled out of the Leeds game on 24/10 with a muscle injury. His manager said on 31/10 that he should be back in a couple of weeks. [Source]
[Injured] Shoulder injury Taken off with a fractured collarbone in the match against Leeds on 24/10. Has since undergone surgery and will be out until December. [Source]
[Suspended] 1 Match Ban Suspended for one match after picking up his fifth booking of the season on 8/11.
[Injured] Knee injury It was revealed on 22/1 that he had suffered a season-ending knee injury that may even keep him out of the start of 2025/26. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a low-grade knee injury in the cup tie against Chelsea on 29/10. Likely to be out until after the November international break. [Source]
[Injured] Groin Injury Picked up a groin injury in the cup tie against Chelsea on 29/10. Underwent surgery on 3/11 and will be out for 8-12 weeks. [Source]
